productionSafety.note: This migration plan is a non-production draft. No production DB writes occur in this phase. Actual migration requires separate explicit approval from a human DBA or authorized operator.

problemStatement.taiwanRevenueReleaseConvention: Taiwan monthly revenue (月營收) is officially released by the 10th calendar day of the following month (TWSE/MOPS regulation). Without a releaseDate field, queries may return data that was not yet publicly disclosed on the asOfDate.

addFields.name: releaseDate
addFields.description: Authoritative release date from TWSE/MOPS. If null, use INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH fallback.

backfillRule.description: For all existing MonthlyRevenue records where releaseDate IS NULL: set releaseDate = 10th day of following month.
backfillRule.rule: releaseDate = IF month=12 THEN DATE(year+1, 1, 10) ELSE DATE(year, month+1, 10)
backfillRule.backfillSqlDraft:
-- NON-PRODUCTION DRAFT. Do NOT run in production without explicit approval.
-- Backfill inferred releaseDates for existing MonthlyRevenue records.
UPDATE "MonthlyRevenue"
SET
  "releaseDate" = (
    CASE
      WHEN month = 12 THEN MAKE_DATE(year + 1, 1, 10)::timestamp
      ELSE MAKE_DATE(year, month + 1, 10)::timestamp
    END
  ),
  "releaseDateSource" = 'INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH',
  "releaseDateConfidence" = 'LOW_TO_MEDIUM'
WHERE "releaseDate" IS NULL;
backfillRule.postBackfillValidation: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "MonthlyRevenue" WHERE "releaseDate" IS NULL; -- expect 0
backfillRule.authoritative_update_process: After authoritative releaseDates are obtained from TWSE/MOPS API, update matching records and set releaseDateSource=AUTHORITATIVE, releaseDateConfidence=HIGH.

validationRequirements.requirement: releaseDate <= asOfDate gate replaces year/month period gate in all query paths
No realized-return based tuning of releaseDate (no returnPct, realizedReturnClass inputs)
No outcome leakage (no outcomePrice, futurePrice, horizonReturnPct in releaseDate computation)
MonthlyRevenueLike interface updated to include optional releaseDate field
FundamentalResearchService.buildFundamentalResearchContextForSymbol receives asOf parameter and gates by releaseDate

rollbackPlan.description: If migration causes issues, rollback by nulling or removing the added columns.
rollbackPlan.prismaMigrationRollback: npx prisma migrate reset (non-prod only) or manual SQL rollback in prod
rollbackPlan.artifactOnlyProof: All artifacts in outputs/online_validation/p13monthly_revenue_* are read-only. No DB was modified in P13 phase.

codeChangesRequired.change: Add releaseDate DateTime?, releaseDateSource String?, releaseDateConfidence String? to MonthlyRevenue model
Add releaseDate?: string | null to MonthlyRevenueLike interface
Replace revenueAsOfWhere year/month logic with releaseDate: { lte: asOfDate } gate
Add asOf parameter to buildFundamentalResearchContextForSymbol; gate monthlyRevenue.findMany by releaseDate: { lte: asOf }

nonGoals: This migration plan does NOT write production DB.
This migration plan does NOT modify scoring formulas, alphaScore, or recommendationBucket.
This migration plan does NOT modify P0/P1/P3/P4 corpus or simulation_snapshot_corpus.
This migration plan does NOT produce ROI figures, win rates, alpha calculations, profit estimates, or performance guarantees.
This migration plan does NOT tune releaseDate based on realized returns or outcome data.
This migration plan does NOT modify ManualReview* modules.
